lines.speaker: First Clown
lines.text: Is she to be buried in Christian burial, when she wilfully seeks her

lines.speaker: First Clown
lines.text: own salvation?

lines.text: I tell thee she is, and therefore make her grave straight. The crowner

lines.speaker: Second Clown
lines.text: hath sat on her, and finds it Christian burial.

lines.speaker: First Clown

lines.speaker: First Clown
lines.text: It must be _se offendendo_, it cannot be else. For here lies the point:

lines.speaker: First Clown

lines.speaker: First Clown
lines.text: branches. It is to act, to do, and to perform: argal, she drowned

lines.speaker: First Clown
lines.text: herself wittingly.

lines.speaker: Second Clown

lines.speaker: First Clown

lines.speaker: First Clown
